name: ELVES
tagline: A Local Volume survey of satellites around Milky Way-mass host galaxies.
description: ELVES is a survey of satellite systems around Milky Way-mass hosts in the Local Volume.
overview: ELVES targets the satellite populations of Milky Way-mass host galaxies in the Local Volume.
This page will collect the survey description, associated papers, public catalogs, imaging products, distance measurements, and citation guidance.
motivation: The survey is intended to support comparisons between satellite populations in nearby Milky Way-mass environments and models of dwarf-galaxy formation.
Future data releases will document the selection, measurements, and recommended use of the public products.

contact.name: [Contact name pending]
contact.note: For questions about ELVES data products, contact [Contact pending].

name: ELVES-Dwarf
tagline: A Local Volume survey of satellites around dwarf host galaxies.
description: ELVES-Dwarf is a survey of satellite systems around dwarf hosts in the Local Volume.
overview: ELVES-Dwarf extends the ELVES survey family to satellite systems around dwarf host galaxies in the Local Volume.
This page will host the survey description, candidate catalogs, distance products, footprint and completeness products, imaging cutouts, papers, and citation guidance.
motivation: Dwarf-host satellite systems provide a lower-mass comparison point for understanding how satellite populations vary with host mass and environment.
Future releases will make the selection function, catalog contents, and recommended citation text explicit.

contact.name: [Contact name pending]
contact.note: For questions about ELVES-Dwarf data products, contact [Contact pending].

name: ELVES-Field
tagline: A Local Volume survey of dwarf galaxies in the field.
description: ELVES-Field is a survey of dwarf galaxies in the Local Volume field.
overview: ELVES-Field focuses on dwarf galaxies in the Local Volume field.
This page will collect the field dwarf catalog, distance measurements, imaging products, papers, data access notes, and citation guidance.
motivation: Field dwarf galaxies provide an environmental reference for interpreting satellites around more massive and lower-mass hosts.
Future releases will describe the catalog construction, measurement products, and appropriate citation practices.
